verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are the great creator You are the wonderful one From dust of the earth You have made us Made us your daughters and sons

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are the hope eternal We see the works you have done We lift our hands up to worship Worship the wonderful one

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Wonderful one Holy and mighty Wonderful one We give you praise Boldly we come Into your presence Drawn by your wonderful love You are the wonderful one

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are the wonderful one You are the wonderful You are the wonderful You are the wonderful one Wonderful one Wonderful one Wonderful one
